recipes.name: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: Creamy avocado on sourdough with a hint of lemon.
steps: Toast the bread until golden.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Spread on toast and top with chili flakes.

recipes.name: Garden Salad
recipes.description: Fresh greens topped with vinaigrette and seasonal vegetables.
ingredients: 5 to 6 cups chopped leafy greens (Romaine, iceberg, or mixed baby greens)
1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved (or 2 regular tomatoes, cut into wedges)
1 tbsp apple cider vinegar or lemon juice
steps: Instructions
Prep the Greens: Wash and thoroughly dry your lettuce leaves. Tear or chop them into bite-sized pieces.
Make the Dressing: Add the olive oil, vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper into a small jar. Secure the lid tightly and shake vigorously until fully combined and slightly thickened.
Toss the Salad: Place the chopped lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and carrots into a large serving bowl.
Serve: Drizzle the vinaigrette over the salad just before serving, toss gently to coat, and enjoy immediately.
